======================================================================
AUTOGLUON ENSEMBLE ANALYSIS
Run date: 2026-04-04  |  Training rows: 1000  |  Mode: all data (test + real)
======================================================================

MODEL PERFORMANCE — Weighted Ensemble (stacked, 2 levels)

FEATURE IMPORTANCE — Mean absolute SHAP values
  (Higher = stronger causal driver of outcome_score)
  Features with zero signal are flagged — likely insufficient data variance.

KEY QUANTITATIVE FINDINGS

PREDICTED OUTCOME SCORES BY ZONE (acute intensity)
  AutoGluon ensemble predictions, not observed means.
  Format: zone -> top protocol (predicted score) | cross-bucket
  overstim         -> H-OS-L1      score=7.513  cross-bucket: X-ME-L1, X-ME-L2
  anxiety          -> H-AX-L1      score=8.153  cross-bucket: X-ME-L1, X-ME-L2
  crisis           -> H-CR-L3      score=7.91  cross-bucket: X-ME-L1, X-ME-L2
  low              -> X-ME-L1      score=9.1  cross-bucket: X-MD-L1, X-MD-L2
  focus            -> T-CF-L3      score=8.026  cross-bucket: X-ME-L1, X-ME-L2
  maintenance      -> T-MB-L3      score=7.495  cross-bucket: X-ME-L1, X-ME-L2
  motivation       -> X-MD-L1      score=8.179  cross-bucket: X-ME-L1, X-ME-L2
  mindclarity      -> X-MC-L1      score=7.679  cross-bucket: X-ME-L1, X-ME-L2
  sleep            -> H-SL-L1      score=7.599  cross-bucket: X-ME-L1, X-ME-L2

CROSS-BUCKET ROUTING ANOMALIES
  Protocols recommended outside their design zone.
  Represent efficacy signals crossing categorical boundaries.
  X-ME-L1      (TRANSFORMING / Mood & Energy) -- cross-recommended in 72/81 combos
  X-ME-L2      (TRANSFORMING / Mood & Energy) -- cross-recommended in 72/81 combos
  X-MD-L1      (TRANSFORMING / Motivation & Drive) -- cross-recommended in 9/81 combos
  X-MD-L2      (TRANSFORMING / Motivation & Drive) -- cross-recommended in 9/81 combos

ZONE EFFICACY RANKING (mean predicted top_score across intensities)
  low              mean predicted top score = 8.842
  anxiety          mean predicted top score = 7.944
  motivation       mean predicted top score = 7.933
  focus            mean predicted top score = 7.782
